params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste (kitchen). Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, open shelving with curated ceramics, warm wood cabinetry accents, clear visual opening to Dine, warm oak cabinetry accents, under-cabinet warm task lighting, clear sightline to Dine. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, family-friendly Japandi interior that pairs Scandinavian lightness with Japanese restraint. Warm neutrals, light oak, and textured linens create an uncluttered, tactile environment while low-profile furniture and measured negative space keep rooms feeling breathable. Design supports daily family life with a deliberate cozy work corner and resilient, easy-to-maintain materials. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
